title: Maid Life SS
description:
✨StoryAfter losing your parents in an accident, your life feels lonely and meaningless.

One day, you find a mysterious maid curled up asleep at your doorstep.

She says she wants to repay you by taking on all your household chores: cooking, cleaning, and all aspects of your daily life. 

She has nowhere else to go, so she begs you to let her live with you.

Though the relationship is odd, and you're wary to tell anyone about it, there's something heartwarming about her that you can't put your finger on...

After she devotes herself entirely to you, you gradually discover the hidden secrets behind her gentle smile. 

The bond...and desire...between you two seems to only be growing stronger.

🎮GameplayMaid Life is a 2D game focused on lighthearted interactions

—akin to a visual novel that simulates living with a lovely maid.

Use a simple, mouse-based interface to chat, make tea, go shopping, change outfits, and perhaps even...sneak up behind her to pull off some "pranks"!

As the days pass and your bond deepens, who knows what naughty things will happen when the curtain of night falls?

Wanna know more about your beautiful maid? Visit the shop to buy mysterious items that reveal her inner thoughts!

Peek in on how she's developing and even...her deepest desires.

"It is the duty of a maid to serve her master's physical needs."

If you can't hold back your urges, perhaps you can just ask her to serve you?

Make her clean the house in only an apron, or tease her with your naughty, mischievous touches.

I wonder how she will react...

If you leave her yearning for days, you may even uncover her deepest kinks and desires.

Get close to your maid and click on her sensitive spots to see how she responds.

During intimate moments, you can choose to insert or pull out. 

This means you can finish on her...or inside!

There's no specific ending to this story. 

Simply enjoy your time together, and bask in her warmth and love.

After spending enough days with her, a memory event will appear and new sex scenes will be unlocked.

🌟Character Introduction

Orikasa Kotone (CV: Narimori Ria)

The mysterious maid you take in after finding her sleeping on your doorstep.

She says she wants to repay you, but you're not sure what for. 

Her smile is gentle, and she keeps your home absolutely spotless.

Kotone is skilled at cooking, cleaning, and making tea. 

She tends to your every need with complete devotion.

As your master, she never hides her affection for you. 

She is your own personal maid, and she yearns to not only care for your daily life but also your lonely heart and...body.

Yet at times, she seems strangely familiar... Who is she, really?

💟 Paper-Doll Dress-Up

Purchase outfits and accessories from the Maid Shop. 

Have her wear new clothes then chat her up—perhaps it'll unlock some new sex scenes!

With over a hundred outfit combinations—hairstyles, casual wear, sleepwear, underwear, and accessories—

—you can freely mix and match her look according to your mood and preferences!

💟 Features💗 Over 100 outfit combinations: Dress her however you like to create your ideal maid!
💗 Playtime: 1-2 hours
💗 9 sex scenes with vivid expressions and outfit variations: Everything from moments of affection to sweet, unexpected teasing.
💗 Adorable 1280x720 2D visuals: Get ready for a warm, dreamy life inside a mansion!

Who's ready for endless days of sweet love with the maid of your dreams?!
description_short: You find a mysterious maid sleeping in front of your house and decide to take her in. She cooks, cleans, and even manages your life. She is loyal to you and only you. This gentle maid wants nothing more than to fulfill your "needs." It's no surprise that love begins to blossom between you two...
